# Em

A simple wrapper component for rendering italic/emphasis text. Renders an `<em>` HTML element.

## Import

```jsx
import { Em } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The text content to italicize |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

All standard Chakra UI style props are also supported.

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Text>
  This is <Em>emphasized</Em> text.
</Text>
```

### With style props

```jsx
<Em color="gray.500">Italicized and muted</Em>
```

### In context

```jsx
<Text>
  The word <Em>serendipity</Em> means the occurrence of events by chance in a happy way.
</Text>
```

## Features

- Renders a semantic `<em>` HTML element for proper accessibility and SEO
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for additional styling
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
- Lightweight wrapper with no additional overhead
